figures.caption: Table 1. Quantitative comparison of weakly supervised methods on the Occ3D-NuScenes [3, 37] benchmark. We report the overall IoU and mIoU, as well as Instance mIoU (InsM), Scene mIoU (ScnM), and the proposed Human-centric mIoU (HCM) that focuses on safety-critical human classes. * indicates reproduced results from official code. ‘cons. veh.’ is short for construction vehicle, and ‘drive. surf.’ indicates driving surface. Best number for each class is in bold, and the second best is underlined.
Table 10. Detailed hyperparameters used in our implementation.

Figure 2. Overview of the proposed DeGO framework. It unifies the Decoupled Gaussian Deformation (DGD) and Factorized Feature Distillation (FFD). The spatialtemporal features from VGGT teacher guides Gaussian rendering through feature alignment, producing foundation-aligned 4D features that drive decoupled motion prediction for nonrigid classes and rigid classes.
Figure 4. Comparison of inference speed and accuracy with state-of-the-art methods on Occ3D-NuScenes validation set.
